summary: Iteration 2 frontend re-test after major design pivot (light theme + 5 paid plans + USD/INR toggle + credit usage + new logo + motto banner). All 15 requested feature checks pass. Sampled 9 category routes plus homepage, pricing, contact, mobile - everything is light themed and functioning.
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 acceptance criteria from review request verified PASS. Body bg confirmed #FBFCFF (rgb(251,252,255)) site-wide; text rgb(15,23,42) dark slate. 'Most Popular' badge (capital P) now rendered correctly on Business plan. Motto banner data-testid='brand-motto' present and hidden on mobile by design (Tailwind responsive). Logo URL matches expected customer-assets Logo%201.png in both navbar and footer.

Note: 'Talk to Sales' string still appears on /pricing (and category pages) but only as a secondary button on the shared FinalCTA section, not on the 5 pricing plan cards. The pricing plan CTAs themselves are correctly 'Choose Starter/Professional/Business/Enterprise/Full Secure'. Review request only required removal from the plan CTAs, so this is acceptable, but flagging in case product wants to eliminate it entirely from pricing route.

Hero CTA correctly updated to 'Start Your Exposure Report' (no 'Free'/'Get Free Exposure' wording). 'Sign Up Free' retained only in navbar (data-testid='navbar-signup') and FinalCTA primary (data-testid='final-cta-primary') as instructed.
Footer correctly drops 'Free Tools & SEO' heading and 'See all plans →' link; 66 footer links still present (SEO grid intact).
Currency toggle (data-testid='currency-usd'/'currency-inr') functions perfectly: all 5 plans flip between $4.99/19.99/49.99/99.99/249.99 and ₹499/1,999/4,999/9,999/24,999.
Credit Usage section renders all 6 services (data-testid='credit-usage-0..5') with correct credit costs (20/40/80/100/150/300).
Ambient gradient orbs (.ambient-bg layer) detected on homepage and across pages.
Contact form still submits and produces 'Thanks — our team will reply within 4 business hours.' toast (light themed).
Mobile 375x812: hamburger present, logo visible, motto correctly hidden, pricing cards stack and render all 5 plans.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site verified end-to-end for the light-theme + 5-plan + USD/INR + credit-usage + new-logo + motto pivot. All data-testid hooks work: brand-motto, navbar-signup, final-cta-primary, currency-usd, currency-inr, pricing-plan-0..4, pricing-cta-0..4, credit-usage-0..5, pricing-page, currency-toggle. Body bg rgb(251,252,255), text rgb(15,23,42). Logo URL https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_threat-monitor-83/artifacts/3n9x5oxp_Logo%201.png present in navbar+footer. Sign Up Free CTAs go to https://app.trackthebreach.com/signup. Pricing plan CTAs link to ${APP_URL}/signup?plan={slug}.

test_summary.motto_banner: PASS - 'Stay Safe, Stay Protected' visible on desktop, hidden mobile
test_summary.logo: PASS - new blue swirl Logo%201.png in navbar+footer
test_summary.light_theme: PASS - body bg rgb(251,252,255), text dark slate, applied site-wide (9 category routes sampled)
test_summary.pricing_5_plans: PASS - Starter/Professional/Business/Enterprise/Full Secure with correct USD prices, credits, taglines, CTAs
test_summary.currency_toggle: PASS - USD <-> INR flips all 5 plan prices correctly
test_summary.credit_usage: PASS - 6 services with correct credit costs (20/40/80/100/150/300)
test_summary.free_word_removal: PASS - Hero CTA is 'Start Your Exposure Report'; 'Sign Up Free' kept in navbar+final-cta as requested
test_summary.footer_no_free_tools_heading: PASS - 'Free Tools & SEO' and 'See all plans →' removed; 66 SEO links retained
test_summary.contact_form: PASS - 'Thanks' toast shown on submit, light themed
test_summary.mobile_responsive: PASS - 375x812 hamburger + logo visible, motto correctly hidden, 5 plans stack on /pricing
test_summary.external_ctas: PASS - navbar-signup and final-cta-primary both link to https://app.trackthebreach.com/signup

rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. Previous iteration's 'Most Popular' casing concern is now resolved (Pricing.jsx renders 'Most Popular' with capital P).
